input_row.title: Ensure 'Remote debugging' is set to 'Off'
input_row.remediation: Remediate from Azure Portal 1. Go to App Services or Function App. 2. Click the name of a function app. 3. Under Settings, click Configuration. 4. In the General settings pane, under Debugging, set Remote debugging to Off. 5. Click Save. 6. Click Continue. 7. Repeat steps 1-6 for each function app requiring remediation. Remediate from Azure CLI For each function app requiring remediation, run the following command to disable remote debugging: az functionapp config set --resource-group <resource-group-name> --name <function-app-name> --remote-debugging-enabled false Default Value: By default, remote debugging is set to off. References: 1. https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/visualstudio/debugger/remote-debugging- azure-app-service 2. https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/security/benchmark/azure/mcsb-posture- vulnerability-management#pv-2-audit-and-enforce-secure-configurations 3. https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/cli/azure/functionapp 4. https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/powershell/module/az.functions/get- azfunctionapp CIS Controls:

first_opinion.response:
**AUDIT APPROACH:** Automated

**PROGRAM NAME:** azure_function_app_remote_debugging_disabled

**AUTOMATION DETAILS:**
The automated program would check the following:

- **APIs Used**: Azure Resource Manager APIs or Azure CLI commands.
- **Specific Resources to Enumerate**: Function Apps within specified resource groups or subscriptions.
- **Exact Configuration Properties/Settings to Validate**: 
  - The property to check is `remoteDebuggingEnabled` under each function app's configuration.
  
- **Clear Pass/Fail Criteria**: 
  - **Pass**: `remoteDebuggingEnabled` is set to `false`.
  - **Fail**: `remoteDebuggingEnabled` is set to `true`.
  
- **Example CLI Command**: 
  ```bash
  az functionapp config show --resource-group <resource-group-name> --name <function-app-name>
  ```

- **Example API Endpoint**:
  ```
  GET https://management.azure.com/subscriptions/{subscription-id}/resourceGroups/{resource-group-name}/providers/Microsoft.Web/sites/{function-app-name}/config/web?api-version=2021-02-01
  ```

This automated approach will enable continuous compliance monitoring to ensure that remote debugging is always set to off, thereby following best practices and mitigating potential security risks associated with exposure to remote debugging.

final_decision.response:

azure_function_app_remote_debugging_disabled

**AUTOMATION DETAILS:**

- **API/CLI Method:** `az functionapp config show`
- **Properties to Check:** `remoteDebuggingEnabled`
